column1: Luis Arraez leads the way for Beat The Streak players, bringing his steady bat and top-of-order role into a strong matchup on the road. With a robust 75.2% hit probability and a favorable park boost, Arraez is as reliable as it gets for a single. Right behind him, Maikel Garcia also headlines the lineup, flashing a similar leadoff profile and a juicy platoon advantage against Parker Messick. Bobby Witt Jr. and Mickey Moniak round out the list, both benefiting from lineup placement and advantageous matchups, but Arraez remains the clear-cut, high-floor pick for anyone looking to keep their streak alive.
